articles.title: 'Monolithic' blockchains outperformed in September — VanEck
articles.description: Monolithic blockchain networks like Solana can theoretically process 65,000 transactions per second without using layer-2 scaling solutions.

articles.title: Ripple Slams SEC Over Latest Appeal
articles.description: Ripple’s CLO Stuart Alderoty slams the SEC’s latest appeal in the ongoing XRP legal battle, calling it a desperate move that harms the agency’s credibility.

articles.title: Cardano DApps Might Get a Facelift With This Technology
articles.description: Cardano’s Charles Hoskinson has weighed in on the tech shift from Prism to HyperLedger Identus. This major tech shift took place in the ecosystem about ten months ago. The transition featured new decentralized solutions, and Hoskinson described it as an Apache2 open-source framework for identity applications. articles.title: Sygnum Bank Sees Solana as a Serious Ethereum Rival
articles.description: Sygnum Bank suggests that Solana's scalability and growing institutional adoption could position it as a serious long-term competitor to Ethereum.
